message:
Fix witness startup: env(1) cannot run shell builtin exec

The env sanitization prepended env -u CLAUDECODE before the start_command,
which begins with exec claude. Since exec is a shell builtin (not an
external binary), env(1) fails with status 127.

Fix: detect the exec prefix, strip it, and re-add it before env so the
shell processes exec as a builtin:
  exec env -u CLAUDECODE NODE_OPTIONS=... claude ...

Fixes: hq-eab (witness sessions failing to start)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
